title: To A Friend.
content:
Look in my book, and herein see
    Life endless signed to thee and me.
    We o'er the tombs and fates shall fly;
    While other generations die.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To A Friend."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
